title: Wet Sunglasses
sourceTitle: Wet Sunglasses Reference Portrait Transform AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image ultra-realistic cinematic wet-skin sunglasses portrait for user-owned close-up face photo before high-fashion rain editorial styling, preserving adult male model with wet tousled hair and dark rectangular sunglasses. Subject: adult male model with wet tousled hair and dark rectangular sunglasses keeps the uploaded face identity and becomes the close-up editorial subject with damp hair, glistening skin, water-droplet sunglasses, defined knuckles, and a silver stone pinky ring. Scene: black background, defined knuckles, cinematic shadow carve, premium fragrance-ad mood without logo frames the portrait as a tight low-key studio image with a dark minimal background and dramatic moisture detail. Composition: Preserve the reference face identity while using a tight close-up crop: one hand lightly grips the dark rectangular aviator sunglasses, the hand and knuckles are prominent, the black fitted tee dissolves into shadow, and the frame stays intimate and high-fashion. Signature Elements: Water-droplet aviator sunglasses, damp hair, glistening skin, hand gripping the frame, defined knuckles, silver pinky ring, black tee fading into darkness, and low-key high-fashion mood. Style: Ultra-realistic high-end fashion editorial photography with moody high-contrast realism, razor-sharp micro-detail, wet skin texture, beard-hair detail, and cinematic luxury finish. Color Palette: Deep black background and matte black tee, cool water highlights, natural skin tones, dark sunglass glass, silver ring accent, and restrained monochrome-leaning contrast. Lighting: Low-key dramatic light carving deep shadows across skin, beard, hand, and sunglasses, with small specular water highlights and controlled editorial falloff. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Wet skin, damp tousled hair, water droplets on dark rectangular aviator sunglasses, matte black cotton tee, silver stone ring, and realistic facial hair texture. Restrictions: Use an adult subject only. Preserve the uploaded face identity when provided.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Scene: black background, defined knuckles, cinematic shadow carve, premium fragrance-ad mood without logo frames the portrait as a tight low-key studio image with a dark minimal background and dramatic moisture detail. Composition: Preserve the reference face identity while using a tight close-up crop: one hand lightly grips the dark rectangular aviator sunglasses, the hand and knuckles are prominent, the black fitted tee dissolves into shadow, and the frame stays intimate and high-fashion. Signature Elements: Water-droplet aviator sunglasses, damp hair, glistening skin, hand gripping the frame, defined knuckles, silver pinky ring, black tee fading into darkness, and low-key high-fashion mood. Style: Ultra-realistic high-end fashion editorial photography with moody high-contrast realism, razor-sharp micro-detail, wet skin texture, beard-hair detail, and cinematic luxury finish. Color Palette: Deep black background and matte black tee, cool water highlights, natural skin tones, dark sunglass glass, silver ring accent, and restrained monochrome-leaning contrast. Lighting: Low-key dramatic light carving deep shadows across skin, beard, hand, and sunglasses, with small specular water highlights and controlled editorial falloff. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Wet skin, damp tousled hair, water droplets on dark rectangular aviator sunglasses, matte black cotton tee, silver stone ring, and realistic facial hair texture. Restrictions: Use an adult subject only. Preserve the uploaded face identity when provided.
